SELECT h3ExactEdgeLengthM(index) AS exactEdgeLengthM FROM test_h3;
SELECT t.index, h3ExactEdgeLengthM(t.index) AS exactEdgeLengthM FROM test_h3 t WHERE t.index IN (SELECT index FROM test_h3 WHERE index > 1310277011704381439);
SELECT t1.index, h3ExactEdgeLengthM(t1.index) AS exactEdgeLengthM FROM test_h3 t1 JOIN (SELECT index FROM test_h3 WHERE index < 1310277011704381441) t2 ON t1.index = t2.index;
SELECT h3ExactEdgeLengthM(index) AS exactEdgeLengthM FROM (SELECT index FROM test_h3 WHERE index = 1310277011704381439) AS edges;
WITH (SELECT index FROM test_h3 WHERE index = 1310277011704381440) AS subquery_index SELECT h3ExactEdgeLengthM(subquery_index) AS exactEdgeLengthM;
SELECT index, h3ExactEdgeLengthM(index) AS exactEdgeLengthM FROM (SELECT index FROM test_h3 ORDER BY index DESC LIMIT 10) AS recent_edges;
SELECT MAX(h3ExactEdgeLengthM(index)) AS maxEdgeLengthM FROM test_h3;
